```{=html}
<div class="practice-timer" data-minutes="10"></div>

<div style="width:92%;margin:0 auto;text-align:left;">

 <div style="background:rgba(255,184,77,0.08);border-left:6px solid #FFB84D;border-radius:0 16px 16px 0;padding:1.5em 2em 1.6em;">

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.82em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.55em;">— practice 01 —</div>

  <div style="font-size:0.82em;font-weight:800;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:1.05em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;">
   Install <a class="waza-btn-dark" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.open('https://github.com/tw93/Waza','_blank','noopener')">Waza</a>, use a skill, inspect its pipeline.
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.75em;">

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.2);border-radius:12px;padding:0.75em 0.9em;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;margin-bottom:0.4em;">
     <i data-lucide="download" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:2;color:#FFB84D;"></i>
     <span style="font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#FFD27F;">Install</span>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#C9C4BC;line-height:1.5;">Add the <a class="waza-btn-dark" role="link" tabindex="0" onclick="window.open('https://github.com/tw93/Waza','_blank','noopener')" style="font-weight:700;">Waza</a> plugin, following its README.</div>
   </div>

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.2);border-radius:12px;padding:0.75em 0.9em;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;margin-bottom:0.4em;">
     <i data-lucide="play" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:2;color:#FFB84D;"></i>
     <span style="font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#FFD27F;">Use</span>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#C9C4BC;line-height:1.5;">Run one skill on a real task and judge the quality of the result.</div>
   </div>

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.2);border-radius:12px;padding:0.75em 0.9em;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;margin-bottom:0.4em;">
     <i data-lucide="workflow" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:2;color:#FFB84D;"></i>
     <span style="font-size:0.56em;font-weight:700;color:#FFD27F;">Inspect</span>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#C9C4BC;line-height:1.5;">Ask your agent about the skill's pipeline to understand how it boosts efficiency.</div>
   </div>

  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
